name: Code.Module.commander_presenters_node_tree_presenter
observations: Node Tree Presenter - Handles presentation logic for node tree with auto-connect | 2 classes, 19 funcs, uses PyQt5
Added telnet_service param for auto-connect before Print All Nodes workflow
Modified process_all_nodes_print_commands: checks connection via telnet_service._ensure_debugger_connection before execution

Deps: models::NodeToken | node_manager::NodeManager | session_manager::SessionManager | log_writer::LogWriter | command_queue::CommandQueue | services.fbc_command_service::FbcCommandService | services.rpc_command_service::RpcCommandService | services.telnet_service::TelnetService

content: src/commander/presenters/node_tree_presenter.py: MVP presenter for node tree UI, handles Print All Nodes workflow with auto-connect check. Manages sequential command processing via CommandQueue, hierarchical icon/color updates. __init__ accepts telnet_service + get_connection_info_callback for auto-connect initialization. process_all_nodes_print_commands checks connection, initializes debugger IP/port from callback if None, aborts workflow if connection fails.

Telnet session UI with smart scroll preservation. append_output() checks was_at_bottom before insertion, restores scroll position for scrolled-up users. is_user_at_bottom() detects scroll position with 5px tolerance. Prevents interruption during content streaming.

BsTool operations UI with smart scroll preservation. append_output() pattern matches telnet_tab: check scroll before insert, restore position if not following. is_user_at_bottom() helper for scroll detection. Ensures user reading experience not disrupted.

Main window with smart tab switching. _smart_switch_to_tab(target_tab, check_scroll) wrapper prevents interruption if user scrolled up. on_log_write_notification() routes output by extension (.fbc/.rpc/.lis→telnet, .log→bstool). on_telnet_command_finished() only shows raw response if no token (avoids duplicates).

Node tree presenter coordinating sequential execution. handle_command_completed() emits tab switch signals but NOT command_output_display_signal (file write notifications handle output display). Prevents duplicate output during Print All Nodes workflow.
